task_updates.executor_notes: Verified `tsc --noEmit` passes with no type errors. Ran a temporary dual-writer repro script against the refactor surface; it passed and was deleted after execution. Scoped Vitest for `src/tools/travel-between-images` passes after updating stale expectations/mocks in `Header.test.tsx`, `BatchModeContent.test.tsx`, and `useVideoGenerationModalController.test.tsx`, plus a partial-settings mock fix in `useTimelineOrchestrator.hook.test.tsx`. The required full `vitest run --reporter=verbose` rerun surfaced additional failing suites outside the travel-between-images scope, including `useTasksPaneController.test.ts`, `PanesContext.test.tsx`, `useDeleteGenerationAction.test.ts`, `GenerationTokenPanel.test.tsx`, `taskCreation.test.ts`, `taskParamContract.test.ts`, `AppProviders.test.tsx`, and `VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx`, so the batch cannot be marked fully complete from this branch state.
